item.title: EasyRec 1.16
item.description:
easyRec 1.16

  • Important: if you are on 1.15 or earlier, please download this update manually from the website — the Sparkle signing key was rotated and in-app update will report "improperly signed". After installing 1.16 manually, automatic updates will resume.
  • Re-signed Sparkle updates with a new EdDSA key pair bundled in the app
  • Added a pre-flight sanity check in the release script to prevent key/plist drift
